response.global_analysis: The audio consists of instrumental electronic dance music, followed by spoken English dialogue from the Hololive English group 'Promise'. There is no vocal music (singing) present in this video segment, confirming the provided Reference JSON's scene descriptions. As such, I have focused on transcribing and translating the spoken banter and the merchandise presentation details accurately, aligning the timestamps precisely with the audio vocalizations.
